manifestName: Strategic Minds Advisory Canonical Image Manifest

globalRules.style: premium advisory, real business systems, crisp SaaS/workflow interfaces, human operators, clear automation context
globalRules.quality: high-resolution, realistic or polished product-rendered bitmap imagery
avoid: secret keys or real customer data in UI
globalRules.accessibility: Every image needs descriptive alt text and must not carry critical text that is unavailable in HTML.
globalRules.safety: Use synthetic dashboards with placeholder data only. No real client data, no secrets, no live Stripe or production infrastructure screenshots.

requiredAssets.placement: first viewport hero background or full-bleed hero media
requiredAssets.prompt: Premium AI business command center for Strategic Minds Advisory: founder/operator reviewing clean workflow dashboards, approval gates, automation timelines, and revenue-system diagrams on modern screens; bright, sharp, realistic, professional consulting studio, no fake brands, no secret data.
requiredAssets.alt: Strategic Minds Advisory command center showing governed AI business workflows and approvals.

requiredAssets.prompt: Clean business systems map with modular AI automation blocks for strategy, build, launch, operations, analytics, and governance; premium SaaS/advisory style, light interface, blue/cyan accents, no tiny unreadable text.
requiredAssets.alt: Modular map of AI-powered business systems and advisory workflows.

requiredAssets.prompt: Premium offer stack visual showing three service tiers as clean system build layers: starter system, setup service, ongoing operating system; polished advisory product visual, realistic cards, no readable pricing claims unless supplied by content.
requiredAssets.alt: Strategic Minds package tiers shown as layered business system components.

requiredAssets.prompt: Visual process pipeline from discovery to validation to build to launch to optimize, with approval gates and rollback checkpoints; crisp modern workflow interface, professional, no sensitive data.
requiredAssets.alt: Process pipeline showing discovery, validation, build, launch, and optimization with approval gates.

requiredAssets.prompt: Professional advisory workspace with an operator planning AI automation systems on a laptop and whiteboard; premium, human, focused, credible, no celebrity likeness, no fake client data.
requiredAssets.alt: Advisor planning governed AI automation systems in a professional workspace.

requiredAssets.prompt: Clean consultation booking scene with calendar, strategy notes, and automation roadmap preview on a modern interface; bright, calm, premium advisory feel.
requiredAssets.alt: Consultation booking visual with calendar and automation roadmap.

requiredAssets.prompt: Synthetic client dashboard for Strategic Minds Advisory showing project journey, documents, payments, meetings, messages, AI assistant, and approvals; clean SaaS UI, placeholder data only, no real names or secrets.
requiredAssets.alt: Client dashboard preview with project journey, documents, payments, meetings, and AI assistant modules.

requiredAssets.prompt: Synthetic admin control plane for approvals, clients, projects, payments, invoices, workflows, agents, reports, receipts, releases, and settings; restrained operational UI, placeholder data only, no real secrets or customer info.
requiredAssets.alt: Admin control plane preview with approvals, workflows, agents, receipts, and release controls.

requiredAssets.prompt: AI assistant interface with visible safe refusal and approval-gate concepts for secrets, live payments, production deploys, messages, and destructive database actions; clean, professional, no real credentials.
requiredAssets.alt: AI assistant interface showing safe refusal categories and approval gates.

requiredAssets.prompt: Payment dashboard in test mode showing pending invoice and checkout test path badges; Stripe-like payment concepts without using Stripe branding, no live card data, no real financial records.
requiredAssets.alt: Payment dashboard preview showing test-mode checkout and invoice status.

requiredAssets.prompt: Release control checklist with preview validation, approval, rollback, receipts, and production lock indicators; modern control-plane interface, no real deployment IDs.
requiredAssets.alt: Release control checklist with preview validation, approval, rollback, and receipt steps.

requiredAssets.prompt: Minimal Strategic Minds Advisory app icon: precise abstract monogram or signal mark suggesting intelligence, motion, and systems; ink background, white/cyan/blue accent, legible at small sizes, no text-heavy logo.
Open graph preview for Strategic Minds Advisory with clear brand name, Intelligence In Motion tagline, and subtle governed AI workflow background; readable, premium, no fake performance claims.
requiredAssets.alt: Strategic Minds Advisory social preview image.
